login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

passwordRules.minLength: Password must be at least 12 characters
passwordRules.maxLength: Password must be at most 32 characters
passwordRules.lowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
passwordRules.uppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and operation mode

security.intro: Add a second step at sign-in using an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
security.scanHint: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
security.backupHint: Store these one-time codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator. They won't be shown again.
security.disableHint: Enter your password and a current code (or a backup code) to turn off two-factor authentication.

mode.title: Operation mode
mode.changeWarning: Changing the mode will permanently delete all movements and conciliations.
mode.confirmBody: Changing the mode will permanently delete all movements and conciliations recorded so far. This action is irreversible.

apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.scopesHint: Each permission enables one API endpoint.

otpWrite.title: Submit OTP code
otpWrite.desc: Sends a bank account the (OTP/SMS) code the bank requested.

statusRead.title: Read account status
statusRead.desc: Checks whether a session is active and whether the bank is requesting a code.

apiKeys.secretTitle: Copy and save this key now
apiKeys.secretHelp: This is the only time the full key is shown. Store it somewhere safe (for example, your integration's environment variable). If you lose it, you'll have to create a new one.
apiKeys.revokeBody: This can't be undone. Any integration using this key will stop working.
apiKeys.revoke2faHint: Enter your 6-digit authenticator code to confirm.

modeSelect.title: How should ReconBanker operate?
modeSelect.subtitle: Choose the operation mode. You can change it later from Settings.
modeSelect.welcome: Welcome! Start by creating a bank account.

reconcile.title: Reconciliation
reconcile.desc: The system polls pending orders from your endpoint, matches them against bank movements, and fires the webhook on reconciliation.

passthrough.title: Direct notification
passthrough.desc: The system does not poll orders. Each detected bank movement triggers a direct webhook with the movement data.
